runner.description: Universal kit execution with kill switch + TTL enforcement + Gemini summary. Pass ?kit=<name> to run any kit server-side.

intel.description: IoTendrils + IoVitals: stealth API sweep and health monitoring

full.description: All sisters combined: complete Io loadout

sweep.description: Universal Intelligence Kit — 22 modules, category drill-down, thingTriggers routing, place-aware queries, quakes time_range, poi v0.2 kind wiring, Trade Me raw passthrough (Session 35), Trade Me size-constraint integrity gate (Session 35), Trade Me preferences registry — 13 arbitrage filters incl. biggest-discount, on-sale, clearance, no-bids, reserve-not-met, buy-now-only, super-seller, pickup-available, afterpay (Session 35). v1.9.0 (Session 36): shared TM_PREFERENCES/tmApplyPreference/tmIntegrityFilter hoisted to kit level; trademe-cars/bikes/boats now surface arbitrage fields and apply preferences via the shared helper — one definition, four retail surfaces. v1.10.0 (Session 37): Listing Detail modules born — trademe-listing-detail (/v1/Listings/{id}.json) + trademe-similar (/v1/Listings/{id}/Similar.json) + investigateListing() entry point. Gated on qualifiesWhen:['listing_id']; normal search flows never dispatch them. Kit-runner accepts ?kit=sweep&listing_id=<id>. Severable from search. v1.12.0 (Session 52 Phase 2): trademe-rental structured-filter dispatch — queryByName now reads opts.module_attributes['trademe-rental'] populated by resolver (attribute table + place-fold patch) and emits canonical TM API params (region, district, property_type, bedrooms_max). Data-gated severability: absent module_attributes → byte-identical legacy search_string fallback. Closes the 'results mismatch TM' class of bug for rent queries.

nz-intel.description: NZ location intelligence — geocode, quakes, volcanoes, weather, elevation, POI, Wikipedia, Wikidata, intensity. v1.4.0 (S82-X): SEVERED realestate.co.nz entirely. RE was redundant after TM's S82 enrichment stack (LINZ + homes + ArcGIS hazards) covered everything RE used to provide. RE has 100/call vs TM 500/call ceiling. Severability doctrine restored — TM translation table no longer carries RE fields. Git history (cartridge versions v1.0.0 - v1.3.0) retains for reversal.

trademe.description: Trade Me marketplace — v1.11.5 (Session 79): DELETED trademe-listing-geo module. v1.11.4's JSON API probe proved TM exposes GeographicLocation.Latitude / GeographicLocation.Longitude at the top level of /v1/Listings/{id}.json. The HTML-scrape detour (v1.11.0-4) was built on a false premise. Geo extraction now lives in trademe-listing-detail's parse() — one network call per listing, not two. homes.co.nz enrichment now fires on any TM property listing via d.modules['trademe-listing-detail'].data.latitude/.longitude. v1.11.0-4 (Session 79): HTML-scrape iterations + JSON probe — all dead code removed. Kung fu banked: walk the JSON API recursively before drifting to HTML-scrape. v1.10.7 (Session 62): brand names removed from bikes thingTriggers.
